docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF **SEE SIGNATURE/RECD BY LINE** SERVED JUL-25-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM(DEFENDANT)**GRANTED**
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-06-2022 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAI, YONG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AIRBNB $831.33 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $876.33 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAI, YONG AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB
(SC-109)AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR -TABITHA LANG TO APPEAR ON BEHALF OF AIRBNB FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-06-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-06-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF YONG LAI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AIRBNB, REPRESENTED BY TABITHA LANG, IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $831.33 FILED BY LAI, YONG AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-06-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB
